hero.label: EDITION
hero.subtitle: Twelve centuries of mastery — swords, ceramics, ukiyo-e, and beyond. Intelligence for collectors, connoisseurs, and the endlessly curious.

home.mission_heading: To illuminate the depth, beauty, and enduring value of Japanese cultural heritage — through rigorous curation, data-driven intelligence, and unwavering respect for tradition.
home.mission_body: EDITION bridges the world of Japanese art and the global collector. We combine deep cultural knowledge with pattern recognition technology to provide authentication support, fair-value analysis, and market intelligence across twelve categories of Japanese cultural assets.
home.auth_desc: EDITION employs a four-layer authentication framework combining traditional connoisseurship with AI-driven pattern recognition. Our proprietary system analyzes brushstrokes, hamon patterns, glaze compositions, and provenance chains to support expert authentication decisions.
home.market_desc: The world's first comprehensive price database for Japanese art and antiques. Track auction results across 8 categories, from swords to contemporary art.

discover.label: Collection
discover.title: Discover
discover.desc: Twelve categories spanning over a millennium of Japanese artistic mastery.

authenticate.label: Authentication Intelligence
authenticate.desc: Four layers of verification — from the connoisseur's trained eye to AI-driven pattern recognition. EDITION builds trust through rigorous, transparent methodology.
authenticate.approach_desc1: In the tradition of the world's leading scientific research departments and provenance methodologies, EDITION employs a multi-layered authentication framework. AI is never the sole arbiter — it is a powerful lens that reveals what the human eye alone cannot see.
authenticate.approach_desc2: Every assessment is transparent. Every methodology is documented. Every conclusion is defensible.
authenticate.layer4_desc: Statistical analysis of listing patterns across global auction houses. Detection of duplicate listings, price anomalies, and provenance gaps that may indicate fraudulent activity.
authenticate.layer3_desc: Convolutional neural networks trained on authenticated works analyze stylistic fingerprints invisible to the human eye — brushstroke patterns, hamon classifications in swords, glaze composition signatures in ceramics.
authenticate.layer2_desc: Following the standards established by the world's leading auction house laboratories, we employ non-destructive scientific testing to verify material authenticity. Period-inconsistent materials are identified with certainty.
authenticate.layer1_desc: The foundation of all authentication. Trained specialists evaluate works through direct examination — assessing form, technique, patina, and the subtle markers that distinguish a master's hand. Provenance is traced through historical records, exhibition catalogues, and institutional archives.
authenticate.defense_desc: As generative AI enables increasingly sophisticated forgeries, EDITION maintains continuous intelligence on emerging threats.
authenticate.threat1_desc: LLM-generated sales records, certificates, and ownership histories that bypass traditional document verification.
authenticate.threat1_defense: Defense: Blockchain-anchored provenance chain + document metadata forensics
authenticate.threat2_desc: GANs and diffusion models trained to replicate specific artistic styles, guiding physical reproduction of paintings and prints.
authenticate.threat2_defense: Defense: Multi-modal analysis — frequency domain + material verification
authenticate.threat3_desc: CT-scan data combined with AI-optimized CNC/robotics to produce structurally accurate physical reproductions.
authenticate.threat3_defense: Defense: Molecular-level patina analysis + nanoscale aging verification
authenticate.cta_desc: A new standard in Japanese cultural asset authentication. Transparent methodology. Immutable records. Absolute confidence.

prices.title: Price Intelligence
prices.desc: Curated auction results and market data across Japanese cultural asset categories. Building the world's first comprehensive price database for Japanese art and antiques.
prices.data_note: Data sourced from public auction records. Prices shown are hammer prices before buyer's premium unless noted.
prices.model_desc: EDITION's proprietary hedonic pricing engine analyzes 22 features — artist biography, medium, dimensions, edition size, and historical auction performance — to estimate fair market value with institutional-grade precision.

kanteishi.hero_desc: Forensic-grade market analysis powered by 50,000+ verified auction records, cross-house artist intelligence, and proprietary hedonic pricing — built for professionals who demand accuracy.
kanteishi.engine_desc: Our ensemble model analyzes 13 features including artist history, medium, dimensions, edition size, and cross-house performance data to deliver institutional-grade price estimates.
kanteishi.data_desc: Comprehensive coverage across Japan's major auction houses. Each record is verified, enriched with metadata, and cross-referenced for maximum intelligence value.
kanteishi.api_desc: Agent-native market intelligence. Every endpoint returns verified, forensic-grade data — ready for integration into your workflows, dashboards, and autonomous systems.
kanteishi.cap1_desc: Fair market value powered by hedonic regression across 50,000+ lots. Artist, medium, size, and house-specific calibration.
kanteishi.cap2_desc: Cross-house appearance tracking for any artwork. Build complete auction history chains across SBI, Shinwa, and Mainichi.
kanteishi.cap3_desc: 7,500+ artist profiles with NCAR authority data, multi-house presence, price trajectories, and biographical intelligence.
kanteishi.cap4_desc: Identify pricing spreads between auction houses. 266,000+ cross-house pairs analyzed for market positioning intelligence.
kanteishi.cta_desc: KANTEISHI is live and processing real market data. Reach out to learn about API access, MCP integration, or custom intelligence reports.
